/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/forge-debug.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/__/src/lexer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/__/src/parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/__/src/compiler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/__/src/value.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/__/src/chunk.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/forge-debug.dir/__/src/vm.cpp.o" -o forge-debug  -ldl
